## Describe the Bug
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## To Reproduce
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Run `llm-scan scan ...`
2. See error

## Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened. Include the full output if possible.

## Environment
- OS: [e.g., macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04, Windows 11]
- Python version: [e.g., 3.11.2]
- llm-scan version: [e.g., 0.1.0] (`llm-scan --version`)

## Additional Context
Add any other context, sample code, or screenshots here.
